creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks, 

(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #1)

> Is this a WITHOUT_CLEAN build? In this tree have you tried building 
> WITH_PIE and WITHOUT_PIE?

I never heard of those options, so the answer is probably "no". 

If I git pull then make clean, might that be enough for the next buildworld to succeed? 

(If this isn't a bug: sorry.)
